{
 "cells": [

   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": null,
   "id": "6a40fdd9",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "# Install gwexpy with pinned versions of core dependencies for reproducibility on Colab\n",
    "\n",
    "%pip install -q \"gwexpy[all]\" \"gwpy<5.0.0\" \"numpy<2.0.0\" \"scipy<1.13.0\" \"astropy<7.0.0\""
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "3f8c139f",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "# キャリブレーション・パイプライン：Counts → Strain 変換\n",
    "\n",
    "重力波検出器は ADC の出力である*ディジタルカウント*でデータを記録します。\n",
    "天体物理解析の前に、**キャリブレーション伝達関数**を適用して\n",
    "物理的な歪み $h(f)$ または変位 $x(f)$ に変換する必要があります。\n",
    "\n",
    "KAGRA のキャリブレーション・パイプラインは2段階で構成されます：\n",
    "\n",
    "1. **カップリング係数測定** — フォトンキャリブレータ（PCal）から\n",
    "   既知の信号を注入し、`ResponseFunctionAnalysis` で検出器応答を測定する\n",
    "2. **キャリブレーション適用** — 生スペクトルをカップリング関数で割り、\n",
    "   キャリブレーション済み歪み相当 ASD を得る\n",
    "\n",
    "**このチュートリアルで学ぶこと：**\n",
    "1. 合成未キャリブレーションデータ（カウント）の生成\n",
    "2. ステップサイン注入から `ResponseFunctionAnalysis` でカップリング係数を抽出\n",
    "3. 周波数依存キャリブレーションモデルのフィッティング\n",
    "4. キャリブレーションを適用した strain キャリブレーション済み ASD の生成\n"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "0ff94096",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "## セットアップ"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 1,
   "id": "b91f6a6c",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-04-06T00:01:18.694475Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-04-06T00:01:18.694369Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-04-06T00:01:21.890329Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-04-06T00:01:21.889411Z"
    }
   },
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "import warnings\n",
    "warnings.filterwarnings(\"ignore\", category=UserWarning)\n",
    "warnings.filterwarnings(\"ignore\", category=DeprecationWarning)\n",
    "\n",
    "import numpy as np\n",
    "import matplotlib.pyplot as plt\n",
    "\n",
    "from gwexpy.timeseries import TimeSeries\n",
    "from gwexpy.frequencyseries import FrequencySeries\n",
    "from gwexpy.analysis.response import ResponseFunctionAnalysis, detect_step_segments\n",
    "from gwexpy.fitting import fit_series\n",
    "from gwexpy.fitting.models import lorentzian, power_law\n",
    "from gwexpy.numerics.constants import SAFE_FLOOR\n"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "a3925525",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "## 1. 合成未キャリブレーションデータの生成\n",
    "\n",
    "DARM（差動アーム長）信号をカウント単位でシミュレートします。\n",
    "システムは以下のノイズ成分を持ちます：\n",
    "- **光学キャビティポール** 50 Hz（単極低域通過特性）\n",
    "- **地震ノイズ** 10 Hz 以下で 1/f^4 で上昇\n",
    "- **ショットノイズ** 100 Hz 以上でフラット\n",
    "- **電源周波数干渉** 60 Hz および 120 Hz\n"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 2,
   "id": "991b9858",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-04-06T00:01:21.893508Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-04-06T00:01:21.893155Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-04-06T00:01:21.995391Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-04-06T00:01:21.994432Z"
    }
   },
   "outputs": [
    {
     "name": "stdout",
     "output_type": "stream",
     "text": [
      "信号: 300 s @ 4096 Hz  (1,228,800 サンプル)\n",
      "RMS (カウント): 1411.87\n"
     ]
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "fs_hz = 4096\n",
    "T     = 300.0\n",
    "t0    = 1_300_000_000\n",
    "N     = int(T * fs_hz)\n",
    "t     = np.arange(N) / fs_hz\n",
    "rng   = np.random.default_rng(42)\n",
    "\n",
    "COUNTS_PER_METER = 4.5e10\n",
    "F_POLE_HZ = 50.0\n",
    "\n",
    "def cal_tf(f):\n",
    "    return COUNTS_PER_METER / (1 + 1j * f / F_POLE_HZ)\n",
    "\n",
    "freqs_noise = np.fft.rfftfreq(N, 1.0 / fs_hz)[1:]\n",
    "shot_counts   = COUNTS_PER_METER * 3e-21\n",
    "seismic_m  = 1e-12 * (10.0 / np.maximum(freqs_noise, 0.1))**4\n",
    "seismic_cnts = np.abs(cal_tf(freqs_noise)) * seismic_m\n",
    "\n",
    "noise_psd = shot_counts**2 + seismic_cnts**2\n",
    "noise_amp = np.sqrt(noise_psd * fs_hz / 2)\n",
    "noise_fft = noise_amp * np.exp(1j * rng.uniform(0, 2*np.pi, size=len(freqs_noise)))\n",
    "noise_fft = np.concatenate([[0.0], noise_fft])\n",
    "noise_counts = np.fft.irfft(noise_fft, n=N)\n",
    "noise_counts += 500 * np.sin(2*np.pi*60  * t)\n",
    "noise_counts += 150 * np.sin(2*np.pi*120 * t)\n",
    "\n",
    "ts_raw = TimeSeries(noise_counts, t0=t0, sample_rate=fs_hz,\n",
    "                    name=\"K1:LSC-DARM_OUT_DQ\", unit=\"ct\")\n",
    "print(f\"信号: {T:.0f} s @ {fs_hz} Hz  ({N:,} サンプル)\")\n",
    "print(f\"RMS (カウント): {ts_raw.rms().value:.2f}\")\n"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "5c4b8393",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "## 2. ステップサイン注入キャンペーン\n",
    "\n",
    "実際のキャリブレーション測定では、検出器がロック中に\n",
    "PCal 信号を複数の離散周波数で順次注入します。\n",
    "ここでは 10〜1000 Hz の 6 周波数をシミュレートします。\n"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 3,
   "id": "a4202895",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-04-06T00:01:21.997864Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-04-06T00:01:21.997741Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-04-06T00:01:22.302073Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-04-06T00:01:22.300951Z"
    }
   },
   "outputs": [
    {
     "data": {
      "image/png": "",
      "text/plain": [
       "<Figure size 1200x300 with 1 Axes>"
      ]
     },
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "display_data"
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "inj_freqs = np.array([10.0, 30.0, 100.0, 200.0, 500.0, 1000.0])\n",
    "step_dur  = 40.0\n",
    "pcal_amp  = 3e-13  # PCal 振幅 [m]\n",
    "\n",
    "ts_inj = np.zeros(N)\n",
    "t_start = 10.0\n",
    "\n",
    "for f0 in inj_freqs:\n",
    "    i0 = int(t_start * fs_hz)\n",
    "    i1 = int((t_start + step_dur) * fs_hz)\n",
    "    amp_counts = np.abs(cal_tf(f0)) * pcal_amp\n",
    "    ts_inj[i0:i1] = amp_counts * np.sin(2*np.pi*f0 * t[i0:i1])\n",
    "    t_start += step_dur + 5.0\n",
    "\n",
    "ts_witness = TimeSeries(ts_inj, t0=t0, sample_rate=fs_hz,\n",
    "                        name=\"K1:CAL-PCAL_SWEPT_EXC\", unit=\"ct\")\n",
    "ts_darm = TimeSeries(ts_raw.value + ts_inj, t0=t0, sample_rate=fs_hz,\n",
    "                     name=\"K1:LSC-DARM_OUT_DQ\", unit=\"ct\")\n",
    "\n",
    "fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(12, 3))\n",
    "ax.plot(t[:int(280*fs_hz)], ts_darm.value[:int(280*fs_hz)],\n",
    "        lw=0.3, alpha=0.7, color=\"steelblue\")\n",
    "ax.set_xlabel(\"時間 [s]\")\n",
    "ax.set_ylabel(\"DARM [カウント]\")\n",
    "ax.set_title(\"ステップサイン PCal 注入を含む生 DARM 信号\")\n",
    "plt.tight_layout()\n",
    "plt.show()\n"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "b2777c9a",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "## 3. カップリング係数の抽出\n",
    "\n",
    "`ResponseFunctionAnalysis.compute()` はウィットネスチャネルの注入ステップを\n",
    "自動検出し、各注入周波数でのカップリング係数を推定します：\n",
    "\n",
    "$$C(f_i) = \\frac{\\text{ASD}_{\\text{ターゲット}}(f_i)}{\\text{ASD}_{\\text{ウィットネス}}(f_i)}$$\n"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 4,
   "id": "85b0b9f9",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-04-06T00:01:22.305098Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-04-06T00:01:22.304913Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-04-06T00:01:30.504001Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-04-06T00:01:30.503115Z"
    }
   },
   "outputs": [
    {
     "name": "stdout",
     "output_type": "stream",
     "text": [
      "検出された注入周波数: [  10.   30.  100.  200.  500. 1000.] Hz\n",
      "カップリング係数: [5.14959810e+07 1.00121682e+00 1.00009536e+00 1.00002108e+00\n",
      " 9.99998128e-01 1.00000068e+00]\n",
      "\n",
      "測定値 vs. 理論値:\n",
      "      10 Hz: 測定=5.150e+07, 理論=4.413e+10, 比=0.0012\n",
      "      30 Hz: 測定=1.001e+00, 理論=3.859e+10, 比=0.0000\n",
      "     100 Hz: 測定=1.000e+00, 理論=2.012e+10, 比=0.0000\n",
      "     200 Hz: 測定=1.000e+00, 理論=1.091e+10, 比=0.0000\n",
      "     500 Hz: 測定=1.000e+00, 理論=4.478e+09, 比=0.0000\n",
      "    1000 Hz: 測定=1.000e+00, 理論=2.247e+09, 比=0.0000\n"
     ]
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "rfa = ResponseFunctionAnalysis()\n",
    "\n",
    "result = rfa.compute(\n",
    "    witness    = ts_witness,\n",
    "    target     = ts_darm,\n",
    "    fftlength  = 4.0,\n",
    "    overlap    = 0.5,\n",
    "    snr_threshold = 5.0,\n",
    "    min_duration  = 10.0,\n",
    ")\n",
    "\n",
    "print(\"検出された注入周波数:\", result.injected_freqs, \"Hz\")\n",
    "print(\"カップリング係数:\", np.abs(result.coupling_factors))\n",
    "\n",
    "print(\"\\n測定値 vs. 理論値:\")\n",
    "for f, cf_meas, cf_th in zip(result.injected_freqs,\n",
    "                              np.abs(result.coupling_factors),\n",
    "                              np.abs(cal_tf(result.injected_freqs))):\n",
    "    print(f\"  {f:6.0f} Hz: 測定={cf_meas:.3e}, 理論={cf_th:.3e}, \"\n",
    "          f\"比={cf_meas/cf_th:.4f}\")\n"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "20f36065",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "## 4. キャリブレーション伝達関数のフィッティング\n",
    "\n",
    "測定されたカップリング係数に単極モデルをフィットします：\n",
    "\n",
    "$$C(f) = \\frac{C_0}{1 + i\\,f / f_\\text{pole}}$$\n"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 5,
   "id": "c0a100b0",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-04-06T00:01:30.506381Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-04-06T00:01:30.506250Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-04-06T00:01:30.513986Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-04-06T00:01:30.513451Z"
    }
   },
   "outputs": [
    {
     "name": "stdout",
     "output_type": "stream",
     "text": [
      "推定ゲイン : 7.140e+09 ct/m  （真値: 4.500e+10）\n",
      "推定ポール : -0.06 Hz  （真値: 50.00 Hz）\n"
     ]
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "freqs_meas = result.injected_freqs\n",
    "cf_meas    = np.abs(result.coupling_factors)\n",
    "\n",
    "cf_fs = FrequencySeries(cf_meas.astype(complex), frequencies=freqs_meas,\n",
    "                        name=\"カップリング関数\", unit=\"ct/ct\")\n",
    "\n",
    "def cal_model_mag(f, C0, f_pole):\n",
    "    return C0 / np.sqrt(1 + (f / f_pole)**2)\n",
    "\n",
    "result_fit = fit_series(\n",
    "    cf_fs.real,\n",
    "    cal_model_mag,\n",
    "    p0=[COUNTS_PER_METER, 60.0],\n",
    ")\n",
    "C0_fit, fpole_fit = float(list(result_fit.params.values())[0]), float(list(result_fit.params.values())[1])\n",
    "\n",
    "print(f\"推定ゲイン : {C0_fit:.3e} ct/m  （真値: {COUNTS_PER_METER:.3e}）\")\n",
    "print(f\"推定ポール : {fpole_fit:.2f} Hz  （真値: {F_POLE_HZ:.2f} Hz）\")\n"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 6,
   "id": "7ebe5c5e",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-04-06T00:01:30.515230Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-04-06T00:01:30.515109Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-04-06T00:01:30.731879Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-04-06T00:01:30.731104Z"
    }
   },
   "outputs": [
    {
     "data": {
      "image/png": "",
      "text/plain": [
       "<Figure size 900x400 with 1 Axes>"
      ]
     },
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "display_data"
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "f_plot = np.geomspace(5, 2000, 500)\n",
    "cf_model = cal_model_mag(f_plot, C0_fit, fpole_fit)\n",
    "\n",
    "fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(9, 4))\n",
    "ax.loglog(freqs_meas, cf_meas, \"o\", ms=8, color=\"steelblue\", label=\"測定値（ステップサイン）\")\n",
    "ax.loglog(f_plot, cf_model, \"-\", lw=2, color=\"tomato\",\n",
    "          label=f\"フィット: C₀={C0_fit:.2e}, f_pole={fpole_fit:.1f} Hz\")\n",
    "ax.loglog(f_plot, np.abs(cal_tf(f_plot)), \"--\", lw=1.5, color=\"seagreen\",\n",
    "          alpha=0.7, label=\"真のモデル\")\n",
    "ax.set_xlabel(\"周波数 [Hz]\")\n",
    "ax.set_ylabel(\"カップリング係数 [ct/m]\")\n",
    "ax.set_title(\"キャリブレーション伝達関数\")\n",
    "ax.legend()\n",
    "ax.grid(True, which=\"both\", alpha=0.4)\n",
    "plt.tight_layout()\n",
    "plt.show()\n"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "fa0c78fe",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "## 5. キャリブレーション適用 — Counts → メートル ASD\n"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 7,
   "id": "c5ba90a9",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-04-06T00:01:30.733967Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-04-06T00:01:30.733847Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-04-06T00:01:31.079665Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-04-06T00:01:31.078281Z"
    }
   },
   "outputs": [
    {
     "data": {
      "image/png": "",
      "text/plain": [
       "<Figure size 1000x500 with 1 Axes>"
      ]
     },
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "display_data"
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "asd_raw = ts_darm.asd(fftlength=16.0, method=\"median\")\n",
    "freqs_asd = asd_raw.frequencies.value\n",
    "\n",
    "cal_mag = cal_model_mag(np.maximum(freqs_asd, 0.1), C0_fit, fpole_fit)\n",
    "asd_cal_data = asd_raw.value / cal_mag\n",
    "asd_cal = FrequencySeries(asd_cal_data, frequencies=freqs_asd,\n",
    "                          name=\"DARM キャリブレーション済み\", unit=\"m/sqrt(Hz)\")\n",
    "\n",
    "shot_m    = shot_counts / COUNTS_PER_METER\n",
    "seismic_f = np.maximum(freqs_asd[1:], 0.1)\n",
    "seismic_asd_m = 1e-12 * (10.0 / seismic_f)**4\n",
    "\n",
    "fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(10, 5))\n",
    "ax.loglog(freqs_asd[1:], asd_cal.value[1:], color=\"steelblue\", lw=1.5,\n",
    "          alpha=0.8, label=\"キャリブレーション済み DARM\")\n",
    "ax.loglog(freqs_asd[1:], seismic_asd_m, \"--\", color=\"darkorange\", lw=1.5,\n",
    "          label=\"地震ノイズモデル\")\n",
    "ax.axhline(shot_m, color=\"seagreen\", ls=\"--\", lw=1.5, label=\"ショットノイズフロア\")\n",
    "\n",
    "for f0 in inj_freqs:\n",
    "    ax.axvline(f0, color=\"gray\", ls=\":\", lw=0.8, alpha=0.6)\n",
    "\n",
    "ax.set_xlabel(\"周波数 [Hz]\")\n",
    "ax.set_ylabel(\"変位 ASD [m/√Hz]\")\n",
    "ax.set_title(\"KAGRA DARM：キャリブレーション済み感度\")\n",
    "ax.set_xlim(1, 2000)\n",
    "ax.legend()\n",
    "ax.grid(True, which=\"both\", alpha=0.4)\n",
    "plt.tight_layout()\n",
    "plt.show()\n"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "b8588a73",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "## まとめ\n",
    "\n",
    "| ステップ | API | 目的 |\n",
    "|---------|-----|------|\n",
    "| ステップサイン注入 | `TimeSeries` + 合成信号 | 既知信号の注入 |\n",
    "| ステップ検出 + カップリング | `ResponseFunctionAnalysis.compute()` | 各周波数での C(f) 抽出 |\n",
    "| キャリブレーションモデルフィット | `fit_series(cf, model, p0)` | 連続的な C(f) の推定 |\n",
    "| キャリブレーション適用 | ASD / C(f) | カウント → メートル/歪み |\n",
    "\n",
    "**関連チュートリアル：**\n",
    "- `case_dttxml_calibration.ipynb` — DTT XML ファイルから測定済み TF を読み込む\n",
    "- `case_transfer_function.ipynb` — 時系列から TF を直接推定する\n"
   ]
  }
 ],
